dashboard.title: Today's Wholesale Prices
dashboard.notice_stale: Notice: Showing prices for {date} ({adDate}) as today's market prices have not yet been published by {market}.
dashboard.no_data_market: Price data will appear here once the first daily update runs for {market}.
dashboard.no_data_any: Price data will appear here once the first daily update runs for any location.
dashboard.no_results_title: No commodities found matching your search.
dashboard.no_results_desc: Try broadening your search term or selecting a different location/category.
dashboard.province_fallback_desc: Prices for this query in neighboring markets within the same province:

commodity.min_tooltip: The lowest individual wholesale trade recorded today. Some buyers may negotiate below this.
commodity.max_tooltip: The highest individual wholesale trade recorded today. Premium or scarce grades may trade near this.
commodity.avg_tooltip: The average (mean) of all wholesale trades recorded today. This is the most representative price for planning purchases.
commodity.no_history: Price history will appear here as data accumulates — check back tomorrow.

top_movers.title: Today's Market Movers
top_movers.subtitle: Biggest price changes from yesterday
top_movers.no_data: Price movement data will appear here once historical data accumulates.

related.title: More in this Category
related.subtitle: Other commodities you might want to check

alerts.title: Get Price Alerts
alerts.desc: Stay updated with daily wholesale market prices for your essential agricultural commodities via Email.
alerts.desc_compact: Notify me immediately when the daily price of this commodity changes significantly.
alerts.success_desc: Thank you! We'll notify you as soon as daily SMS and email alert delivery goes live.
alerts.error_invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.

footer.desc: Empowering Nepalese farmers, traders, and consumers with daily transparent pricing data from wholesale markets across Nepal.
footer.source: Source: Kalimati Fruits & Vegetable Market Development Board, Government of Nepal
footer.source_desc: Daily wholesale prices from Kalimati Market Board & Govt. AMPIS. Monthly retail staple prices from WFP / HDX Food Prices Dataset (CC BY-IGO).

data_freshness.monthly_note: This is a monthly retail price from the WFP food price monitoring programme. It reflects retail market conditions, not wholesale.
data_freshness.daily_note: This is a daily wholesale price from the Kalimati / AMPIS market boards.
